

# Amazon Linux 2 release notes

| [Updated packages.](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-20220218.html) | Amazon Linux 2 2.0.20220218.1 includes updated packages for this release. | February 18, 2022 | 
| [Kernel updates.](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-20220207.html) | Amazon Linux 2 2.0.20220207.1 includes kernel updates, fixed CVEs, features, and backports for this release. | February 7, 2022 | 
| [Updated packages.](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-20220121.html) | Amazon Linux 2 2.0.20220121.0 includes updated packages for this release. | January 21, 2022 | 
| [Updated packages.](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-20211223.html) | Amazon Linux 2 2.0.20211223.0 includes kernel updates and updated packages for this release. | December 23, 2021 | 
| [Updated NSS to fix CVE-2021-43527.](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-20211201.html) | Amazon Linux 2 2.0.20211201.0 fixed an issue with Network Security Services (NSS) that affected up to and including version 3.73. This issue caused NSS to be vulnerable to a heap overflow when handling DER-encoded DSA or RSA-PSS signatures. | December 1, 2021 | 
| [Amazon Linux 2 .0.20211103.0 repositories point to the Amazon S3 dual stack IPv4/IPv6 endpoint.](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-20211103.html) | The system-release was updated to point the Amazon Linux repositories to the Amazon S3 dual stack IPv4/IPv6 endpoint.  | November 3, 2021 | 
| [Updated packages](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-20211005.html) | Amazon Linux 2 2.0.20211005.0 includes updated packages for this release. | October 5, 2021 | 
| [Update ca-certificates to version 2021.2.50-72.amzn2.0.1](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-20211001.html) | Amazon Linux 2 2 .0.20211001.1 updated the ca-certificates to version 2021.2.50-72.amzn2.0.1. This addresses the expiring IdentTrust DST Root CA X3. This affected some Let’s Encrypt TLS certificates. | October 1, 2021 | 
| [Amazon Linux 2 2.0.20210813.1 Fixed boot problems with grub2 on arm64 and improved compatibility of grub2 generated config file with grubby.](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-20210813.html) | Fixed occasional boot problems with grub2 on ARM64 and improved compatibility of grub2 generated config file with grubby. | August 13, 2021 | 
| [Amazon Linux 2 2.0.20210721.2 GRUB updated to 2.06](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-20210721.html) | GRUB has been updated to 2.06 with some launch time improvements. | July 21, 2021 | 
| [Amazon Linux 2 2.0.20210525.0 Updated chrony to 4.0.](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-20210525.html) | Updated chrony to 4.0 from 3.5.1. | May 25, 2021 | 
| [Amazon Linux 2 2.0.20210427.0 The ec2-net-utils bug was fixed with multiple secondary IPs attached to one ENI.](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-20210427.html) | Amazon Linux 2 2.0.20210427.0 The ec2-net-utils bug was fixed with multiple secondary IPs attached to one ENI. | April 27, 2021 | 
| [Amazon Linux 2 2.0.20210421.0 Updated irqbalance to 1.7.0.](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-20210421.html) | Updated irqbalance to 1.7.0 from 1.5.0. AL2 AMIs default to HTTPS for repository access. | April 21, 2021 | 
| [Amazon Linux 2 2.0.20210318.0 yum will no longer make IMDSv1 calls.](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-20210318.html) | With this update, yum will no longer attempt to make IMDSv1 calls. The amazon-linux-extras utility has been updated to support a simpler format of the Extras catalog. | March 18, 2021 | 
| [Amazon Linux 2 2.0.20210126.0 Connect to yum over HTTPS.](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-20210126.html) | With this update, Amazon Linux 2 can now connect to its yum repositories over HTTPS. This can be enabled on boot or at runtime. | January 26, 2021 | 
| [Amazon Linux 2 2.0.20201218.0 Renewed GPG key.](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-20201218.html) | This update renewed GPG key and updated system-release to allow for the use of HTTPS repositories with Amazon Linux.  | December 18, 2020 | 
| [Amazon Linux 2 2.0.20201111.0 Fixed time calculation errors when using dates after 2038.](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-20201111.html) | Addressed the glibc bug that lead to time calculation errors whenever using dates after 2038. Instance launch times were also improved. This was achieved by adding the new dracut-config-ec2 package, which ensure that the initramfs that are built for use inside EC2 don’t include extra files that aren’t already used inside EC2. | November 11, 2020 | 
| [Amazon Linux 2 2.0.20200904.0 Updated to Python 2.7.18.](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-20200904.html) | Two kernel CVEs were added and the CVE-2019-20907 bug in python 2.7.18 was addressed. | September 4, 2020 | 
| [Amazon Linux 2 2.0.20200824.0 Security updates for gettext, python2-rsa, and python. Updated AWS CLI.](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-20200824.html) | Included are security updates for gettext, python2-rsa, and python. The AWS CLI was updated, and a bug was addressed for the amazon-linux-extras utility. After this fix, the utility no longer recommends deprecated topics. | August 24, 2020 | 
| [Amazon Linux 2 2.0.20200722.0 Security updates and bug fixes.](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-20200722.html) | Security updates were added for libxml2 and thunderbird, and a dependency bug was fixed for system-rpm-config. | July 22, 2020 | 
| [Amazon Linux 2 Python updated to 2.7.18.](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-06-17-2020.html) | Python 2.7 was updated to most recent upstream version - 2.7.18. The ca-certificates fix was addressed for the Sectigo intermediate CA expiration issue. | June 17, 2020 | 
| [Amazon Linux 2 Kernel Live Patching is in public preview.](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-05-29-2020.html) | Amazon Linux 2 added the Kernel Live Patching Public Preview, which applies CVE fixes without the need for reboot. | May 29, 2020 | 
| [Amazon Linux 2 Linux kernel 4.19 is available.](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-07-18-2019.html) | Linux kernel 4.19 was made available in Amazon Linux 2 Extras channel. | July 18, 2019 | 
| [Amazon Linux 2 Amazon EC2 Instance Connect is enabled by default.](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-06-27-2019.html) | Changed Amazon EC2 Instance Connect is enabled by default. | June 27, 2019 | 
| [Amazon Linux 2 AMIs with NVIDIA GPU drivers are available.](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-05-23-2019.html) | Amazon Linux 2 AMIs with NVIDIA GPU drivers are now pre-installed and pre-configured for use on the P and G instance families that are available on AWS Marketplace. | May 23, 2019 | 
| [Amazon Linux 2 A new systemd service is added to launch on boot.](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-05-14-2019.html) | A new systemd service was added to launch on boot. The service submits the host public keys for identity validation to support an upcoming feature for connecting to EC2 instances. | May 14, 2019 | 
| [Incorrect permissions fixed.](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-03-13-2019.html) | This update fixes incorrect permissions for some system files. | March 13, 2019 | 
| [A1 support](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-11-26-2018.html) | Amazon Linux 2 is now supported for use on A1 instances. | November 26, 2018 | 
| [ENA driver update introduces Low Latency Queues](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-11-19-2018.html) | An ENA driver update was added. This update introduces Low Latency Queues (LLQ) for improved average and tail latencies. It also adds support for receive checksum offload that improves CPU utilization. | November 19, 2018 | 
| [Updated the OpenSSH daemon configuration file.](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-10-31-2018.html) | The OpenSSH daemon configuration file /etc/ssh/sshd\_config has been updated. The AuthorizedKeysCommand value is configured to point to a customized script and to /opt/aws/bin/curl\_authorized\_keys to support an upcoming feature to read SSH public keysfrom the EC2 instance metadata during the SSH connection process. | October 31, 2018 | 
| [Support for 32-bit Libraries.](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AL2/latest/relnotes/relnotes-9-25-2018.html) | Amazon Linux 2 now supports 32-bit libraries and compatibility packages,. With this support, you can now run 32-bit applications on Amazon Linux 2. | September 25, 2018 |
